title: Add Trickle timer parameter MUST checks (Imin=4s, Imax=17min) and reset triggers in Zephyr RPL
description: Implement RFC2119 compliance for Trickle in lichen/subsys/lichen/rpl/trickle.c, rpl_dodag.h, dodag.c per spec/05-routing.md:8.3 and draft-lichen-rpl-lora-00.md:6. Match Rust behavior for interop. Include Kconfig defaults.
